title: Feature Slice To Tactical Batch
prompt: Read `./feature-batch-slice.md`, `./feature-batch-dependencies.md`, and `./feature-batch-verification.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the next tactical execution batch and an honest execution checkpoint for this slice. Keep the batch short and route to the correct downstream implementation discipline.

assertions.name: tactical-not-strategic
assertions.description: The batch stays in 2-5 minute execution steps.

assertions.name: routes-to-real-discipline
assertions.description: The output explicitly routes through the correct implementation discipline.

assertions.name: stop-conditions-explicit
assertions.description: Pause and stop conditions are visible.

assertions.name: checkpoint-honest
assertions.description: The checkpoint records verified progress and open work honestly.
